query:
UPDATE sales s
INNER JOIN parcels p ON s.parcelId = p.parcelId
SET 
  s.squareFeet = p.squareFeet,
  s.yearBuilt = p.yearBuilt,
  s.bedrooms = p.bedrooms,
  s.propertyType = p.propertyType
WHERE s.parcelId IS NOT NULL AND p.parcelId IS NOT NULL;
